title: Change-aware criteria cache (scout-side Tier 1 + Tier 2 consumer)
goal: Replace dumb-TTL invalidation of the cached company-fit brief with the change-propagation cost cascade: /changes cursor (Tier 0) -> distill-basis gate (Tier 1) -> LLM synthesis (Tier 2), plus an honest tri-state criteria badge
prerequisite: brainbot 5dbc604 (GET /changes?since=<cursor> Tier 0 cursor + toolkit onChange) — already merged to brainbot master; contract in brainbot/docs/consumer-api.md

stories.title: Store: cursor + verified_at on brain_profile_cache (migration + accessors)
Resolver cost cascade: Tier 0 (cursor) -> Tier 1 (basis) -> Tier 2 (synthesize)
Profile endpoint + PWA: replace 'stale' bool with Current/Unverified/Changed tri-state
